message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="scott-wlaschin" color="pink" summary="Scott approves -- no domain concerns, clean work">
Scott Wlaschin here -- reviewed the changes. Consensus from me.

No domain impact. The test changes are well-isolated and use the right level of abstraction (UI interactions, not domain internals). Good test isolation with separate emails per test. The axe-core integration catching the real contrast bug on the primary color is exactly the value we want from automated a11y scanning. Clean work.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Scott Wlaschin approved -- that's 2 of 8 reviewers. Waiting for the remaining 6.
